# defectdojo_language_type (Resource)

DefectDojo Language Type

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "defectdojo_language_type" "example" {
  language = "Python"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `language` (String) The name of the language

### Optional

- `color` (String) Color associated with the language

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Identifier
